• Home
  • Details
  • FAQ
Arsenal App

Details

Supported Collections

With Arsenal, many collections can be created, from weapons and ammunition to accessories such as optics, silencers, and lasers, to books. The collections are constantly being expanded, with more literature and the management of reloading equipment being planned, for example.

Main Collections

Weapons

  • Manufacturer
  • Model Name
  • Manufacturing Date
  • Origin Country
  • Caliber
  • Serial
  • Permit
  • Acquision Date
  • Price
  • Acquired from
  • Current market value
  • Shot count
  • Last shot
  • Last cleaned
  • Cleaning interval
  • Main Color
  • Custom Inventory Identifier

Ammunition

  • Manufacturer
  • Origin Country
  • Caliber
  • Current stock
  • Headstamp
  • Critical stock
  • Designation
  • Last change of stock
  • Bullet type
  • Bullet weight
  • Custom Inventory Identifier

  • Custom Inventory Identifier

Supported Calibers

Some functionality like QuickShot depend on a specific caliber format. In-App there are guardrails in place to ensure a caliber follows this format, however when importing your own custom data, you may need to amend your caliber data first.

Below is a list of the 674 calibers and their exact format the App supports. If you need to specify multiple calibers (for example if a Revolver shoots .357 Magnum and .38 Special), separate them with a comma and space ", ":

.357 S&W Magnum, .38 S&W Special

2mm (.79 - .117)
  • .10 Eichelberger Long Rifle
  • .10 Eichelberger Pup
  • .10 Eichelberger Squirrel
  • 2.34mm rimfire
  • 2mm pinfire
  • 2mm Kolibri
3mm (.118 - .156)
  • .12 Cooper
  • .12 Eichelberger Carbine
  • .12 Eichelberger Long Rifle
  • .12 Eichelberger Win Mag RF
  • .14 Cooper
  • .14 Eichelberger Bee
  • .14 Eichelberger Dart
  • .14 Jet Junior
  • .14 Walker Hornet
  • .14-222
  • .14/222 Eichelberger Mag
  • 3mm Kolibri
  • 3mm US
4mm (.157 - .196)
  • .17 Ackley Bee
  • .17 Bumble Bee
  • .17 HMR
  • .17 Hornet
  • .17 Mach 2
  • .17 Mach IV
  • .17 PMC/Aguila
  • .17 Remington
  • .17 Remington Fireball
  • .17 Winchester Super Magnum
  • 4mm Lienhard
  • 4mm M20 (4x10 mm)
  • 4.25mm Liliput
  • 4.38x30mm Libra
  • 4.5x26mm MKR
  • 4.5x40mmR
  • 4.6x30mm HK
  • 4.6x36mm
  • 4.85x49mm
5mm (.197 - .235)
  • .19 Badger
  • .19 Calhoon Hornet
  • .19-223
  • .20 Tactical

  • 2 bore: 3+1⁄2 in (89mm)
  • 4 bore: 3+1⁄4 in (83mm)
  • 4 bore: 4 in (102mm)
  • 6 bore
  • 8 bore: 3 in (76mm)

  • 10 bore: 3+1⁄2 in (89mm)
